TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_babaledaw, title = babaledaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/babaledaw} }

S.FORM: == babaledaw == śď¨Á®ĽŤĚó/ sa lebulebud ku babaledaw i umaumahan. siwkay nu babaledaw u kulit nu babaledaw a kidu sa, u landaway atu makulahay . sapilimet i liwliw , u midiputay a kulit šŅĚŤ≠∑ŤČ≤. mukan tu nipaluma' ku babaledaw, sisa mabidang ku malukay tu babaledaw. itawya, tuduhen ikiken nu malukay ku babaledaw, bangsis a'su tu. hali mukan tu niyazu'ay a tademaw. mibabaledaw śäďŤĚóŤü≤/ mibabaledaw kaku i umaumahan nacila. sibabaledawan śúČŤĚóŤü≤ÁöĄŚúįśĖĻ/ sibabaledaw ku umah ni Kacaw. u sulit nu Amilika Locusts are certain species of short-horned grasshoppers in the family Acrididae that have a swarming phase. These insects are usually solitary, but under certain circumstances, become more abundant and change their behaviour and habits, becoming gregarious. No taxonomic distinction is made between locust and grasshopper species; the basis for the definition is whether a species forms swarms under intermittently suitable conditions.
S.PHON: == babar~…ĺ…ôdaw == ***/ sa r~…ĺ…ôbur~…ĺ…ôbud ku babar~…ĺ…ôdaw i umaumańßan. siwkaj nu babar~…ĺ…ôdaw u kur~…ĺit nu babar~…ĺ…ôdaw a kidu sa, u r~…ĺandawaj atu makur~…ĺańßaj . sapir~…ĺim…ôt i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw , u midiputaj a kur~…ĺit ***. mukan tu nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku babar~…ĺ…ôdaw, sisa mabidaŇč ku mar~…ĺukaj tu babar~…ĺ…ôdaw. itawja, tuduńß…ôn ikik…ôn nu mar~…ĺukaj ku babar~…ĺ…ôdaw, baŇčsis a Ē~ °su tu. ńßar~…ĺi mukan tu nijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw. mibabar~…ĺ…ôdaw ***/ mibabar~…ĺ…ôdaw kaku i umaumańßan na ¶ir~…ĺa. sibabar~…ĺ…ôdawan ******/ sibabar~…ĺ…ôdaw ku umańß ni ka ¶aw. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika r~…ĺo ¶usts ar…ô ¶…ôrtain sp…ô ¶i…ôs of sńßort-ńßorn…ôd grassńßopp…ôrs in tńß…ô famir~…ĺj a ¶ridida…ô tńßat ńßa*…ô a swarmiŇč pńßas…ô. tńß…ôs…ô ins…ô ¶ts ar…ô usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj sor~…ĺitarj, but und…ôr ¶…ôrtain ¶ir ¶umstan ¶…ôs, b…ô ¶om…ô mor…ô abundant and ¶ńßaŇč…ô tńß…ôir b…ôńßa*iour and ńßabits, b…ô ¶omiŇč gr…ôgarious. no ta*onomi ¶ distin ¶tion is mad…ô b…ôtw…ô…ôn r~…ĺo ¶ust and grassńßopp…ôr sp…ô ¶i…ôs; tńß…ô basis for tńß…ô d…ôfinition is wńß…ôtńß…ôr a sp…ô ¶i…ôs forms swarms und…ôr int…ôrmitt…ôntr~…ĺj suitabr~…ĺ…ô ¶onditions.
S.FORM: == babaledaw == śď¨Á®ĽŤĚó/ sa lebulebud ku babaledaw i umaumahan. siwkay nu babaledaw u kulit nu babaledaw a kidu sa, u landaway atu makulahay . sapilimet i liwliw , u midiputay a kulit šŅĚŤ≠∑ŤČ≤. mukan tu nipaluma' ku babaledaw, sisa mabidang ku malukay tu babaledaw. itawya, tuduhen ikiken nu malukay ku babaledaw, bangsis a'su tu. hali mukan tu niyazu'ay a tademaw. mibabaledaw śäďŤĚóŤü≤/ mibabaledaw kaku i umaumahan nacila. sibabaledawan śúČŤĚóŤü≤ÁöĄŚúįśĖĻ/ sibabaledaw ku umah ni Kacaw. u sulit nu Amilika Locusts are certain species of short-horned grasshoppers in the family Acrididae that have a swarming phase. These insects are usually solitary, but under certain circumstances, become more abundant and change their behaviour and habits, becoming gregarious. No taxonomic distinction is made between locust and grasshopper species; the basis for the definition is whether a species forms swarms under intermittently suitable conditions.
S.PHON: == babar~…ĺ…ôdaw == ***/ sa r~…ĺ…ôbur~…ĺ…ôbud ku babar~…ĺ…ôdaw i umaumańßan. siwkaj nu babar~…ĺ…ôdaw u kur~…ĺit nu babar~…ĺ…ôdaw a kidu sa, u r~…ĺandawaj atu makur~…ĺańßaj . sapir~…ĺim…ôt i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw , u midiputaj a kur~…ĺit ***. mukan tu nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku babar~…ĺ…ôdaw, sisa mabidaŇč ku mar~…ĺukaj tu babar~…ĺ…ôdaw. itawja, tuduńß…ôn ikik…ôn nu mar~…ĺukaj ku babar~…ĺ…ôdaw, baŇčsis a Ē~ °su tu. ńßar~…ĺi mukan tu nijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw. mibabar~…ĺ…ôdaw ***/ mibabar~…ĺ…ôdaw kaku i umaumańßan na ¶ir~…ĺa. sibabar~…ĺ…ôdawan ******/ sibabar~…ĺ…ôdaw ku umańß ni ka ¶aw. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika r~…ĺo ¶usts ar…ô ¶…ôrtain sp…ô ¶i…ôs of sńßort-ńßorn…ôd grassńßopp…ôrs in tńß…ô famir~…ĺj a ¶ridida…ô tńßat ńßa*…ô a swarmiŇč pńßas…ô. tńß…ôs…ô ins…ô ¶ts ar…ô usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj sor~…ĺitarj, but und…ôr ¶…ôrtain ¶ir ¶umstan ¶…ôs, b…ô ¶om…ô mor…ô abundant and ¶ńßaŇč…ô tńß…ôir b…ôńßa*iour and ńßabits, b…ô ¶omiŇč gr…ôgarious. no ta*onomi ¶ distin ¶tion is mad…ô b…ôtw…ô…ôn r~…ĺo ¶ust and grassńßopp…ôr sp…ô ¶i…ôs; tńß…ô basis for tńß…ô d…ôfinition is wńß…ôtńß…ôr a sp…ô ¶i…ôs forms swarms und…ôr int…ôrmitt…ôntr~…ĺj suitabr~…ĺ…ô ¶onditions.
